Total Additional ChargesE0.00

8. Terms & Conditions

  • Vehicles must be returned on time and with the same fuel level as received. Late return charges may apply.
  • Cross-border travel and rental extensions require prior approval. Extensions must be requested at least 12 hours before expiry.
  • Customers are responsible for traffic fines, misuse, loss, damage, insurance excess and related recovery costs arising during the rental period.
  • Accidents, theft and breakdowns must be reported to ALLCARS Rental Services immediately.
  • Vehicles collected after hours are deemed collected at 17:00, unless otherwise agreed.
  • Full terms and conditions are contained in the Rental Agreement.

Additional Charges Policy

Late Return: 1hr E100, 2hrs E200, 3hrs E300, 4hrs E400, 5hrs+ Full Day Charge.

Vehicle Care: Car Wash E100; dirt, stains, odours, missing equipment and damage charged as assessed.

IMPORTANT INFORMATION

  • Vehicles must be returned on time and with the same fuel level as received. Late return charges may apply.
  • Cross-border travel and rental extensions require prior approval. Extensions must be requested at least 12 hours before expiry.
  • Customers are responsible for traffic fines, misuse, loss, damage, insurance excess and related recovery costs arising during the rental period.
  • Accidents, theft and breakdowns must be reported to ALLCARS Rental Services immediately.
  • Vehicles collected after hours are deemed collected at 17:00, unless otherwise agreed.
  • Full terms and conditions are contained in the Rental Agreement.

SECTION 2: TERMS AND CONDITIONS

  1. Condition of Vehicle: The Renter confirms that the vehicle and equipment listed in this Agreement have been inspected and accepted in good condition at handover.
  2. Driver Qualification: The Renter warrants that he/she is legally qualified and competent to operate the vehicle and holds a valid driver’s licence.
  3. Rental Period: The vehicle is rented for the period stated in Section 1. Any extension must be approved by ALLCARS and paid for immediately upon approval.
  4. Permitted Use: The vehicle shall not be used for illegal purposes, racing, competitions, towing, pushing another vehicle, reckless driving, negligent driving, or by any unauthorized person. The Renter remains fully responsible for any authorized additional driver.
  5. Insurance and Excess: In the event of an accident, loss, damage or theft, the Renter is responsible for the first E9,500.00 insurance excess, payable within one week. Insurance does not cover negligence, reckless driving, driving under the influence, unauthorized use, passengers, drivers, personal belongings or items left in the vehicle.
  6. Security Deposit: ALLCARS may deduct from the security deposit any vehicle damage, missing equipment, fuel shortage, car wash charge, late return penalty, outstanding rental amount, recovery cost or other amount due under this Agreement. Any remaining balance shall be refunded to the Renter.
  7. Destination: The vehicle shall be used within the declared destination and surrounding areas not exceeding an 80 km radius unless otherwise approved by ALLCARS. Cross-border travel is prohibited unless expressly authorized by ALLCARS.
  8. Collection and Return: Vehicle collection and return are conducted during ALLCARS operating hours of 08:00 to 17:00. Collections before 08:00 require prior approval and may attract additional charges. Vehicles collected or returned after hours are deemed to have been collected or returned at 17:00 unless otherwise agreed by ALLCARS.
  9. Late Return Penalties: A grace period of 15 minutes applies. Late return charges are: up to 1 hour E100; up to 2 hours E200; up to 3 hours E300; up to 4 hours E400; 5 hours and above full day charge.
  10. Traffic Fines and Penalties: The Renter is solely responsible for all traffic offences, fines, toll charges, impound fees and penalties arising during the rental period.
  11. Breakdowns, Accidents and Repairs: The Renter shall immediately notify ALLCARS of any accident, damage, breakdown or mechanical fault. Unauthorized repairs are prohibited unless approved by ALLCARS.
  12. Jurisdiction: This Agreement shall be governed by and interpreted in accordance with the laws of the Kingdom of Eswatini.
I confirm that the information provided is true and correct, that I have inspected and accepted the vehicle and equipment listed herein, and that I have read, understood and agree to the terms and conditions recorded in this Car Rental Agreement.
